name: MoneyGram
description_short: Raleigh, NC's MoneyGram at 4309 New Bern Ave offers check cashing, money transfers, and bill payments.
description_long:
MoneyGram's Raleigh, NC location at 4309 New Bern Ave is a standalone check-cashing store open seven days a week. Located on the central corridor of Raleigh, this branch operates from 7 AM to 11 PM daily, making it convenient for residents and visitors throughout the area. The New Bern Ave location is easily accessible for anyone in Raleigh seeking quick financial services.

This Raleigh MoneyGram branch specializes in check cashing, domestic and international money transfers, bill payment services, and cash advances. For questions about services or fees at this New Bern Ave location in Raleigh, NC, customers can call +1 800-746-7287 to speak with staff about their specific needs.

If you need quick cash in Raleigh, NC, this New Bern Ave MoneyGram provides efficient check-cashing services without lengthy processing. Bring a valid government-issued ID when visiting—whether you're sending money internationally or cashing a local check, the staff can process your transaction quickly.
pros: 16 conveniently located partner sites within Raleigh area, including major retailers like Walmart and CVS
Extended hours available at many locations, with some open until 10:00 PM or 11:59 PM
Hybrid service model allowing customers to manage transfers online or complete transactions in-person
Nationwide network providing consistency across multiple states and locations
Partnerships with recognizable brands (Walmart, CVS, International Foods) reduce friction in accessing services
Multiple transaction types available at single locations (money orders, wire transfers, bill payment, check cashing)
Easy-to-use location finder with mapping, address search, and hours information
cons: Service fees for transfers and check cashing are not transparent on the website and likely substantial
Dependency on retail partner hours means availability is inconsistent—some locations close early or on Sundays
No mention of competitive rates or fee comparisons versus traditional banks or other transfer services
Limited information about international transfer corridors, exchange rates, or delivery speed options
Check cashing available only at partner locations, not through online channels
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need check cashing without a bank account
International immigrants sending money to family abroad through established corridors
Consumers seeking convenient bill payment or money order services near their home or work
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need check cashing, money transfers, or bill payment services at convenient retail locations. The main caveat is that fees are not disclosed upfront and likely represent a significant cost versus traditional banking, making this service most economical for occasional users rather than frequent money transfer needs.
services: In-person transfer completion at partner locations
Same-day or next-day fund delivery options (implied)
meta_description: Raleigh, NC MoneyGram at 4309 New Bern Ave. Check cashing, money transfers, and bill payments. Open 7AM-11PM daily.
